programme.title: Hair Bear Bunch
programme.desc: The Hair Bears fall short on southern hospitality when they wrongly conclude their new roommate is a spy for Peevly and ship the bear out of the zoo on a tourist bus

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Doug and Roxanne move to Springwood but while Dougs at work Roxanne begins to unpack and discovers that a mix-up with the movers has left their house filled with someone elses possessions -- in the boxes she finds bloody knives and shredded dresses Meanwhile Emily discovers a stack of 19th century love letters hidden behind a panel in her new home and she begins to envision the relationships of the authors

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Four boys find out that the local undertaker and a pharmacist are in cahoots to murder rich locals and profit from their funerals

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An alcoholic reporter is inspired by a beautiful woman to find a good murder case no matter what

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Predatory electronics salesman Jack Rhodes uses a video dating service to pick up lonely young women for one-night stands but meets his match in cunning enticing Barbara who invites Jack on a date to her high-rise apartment loft

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Taking a job with the railroad Eric meets and befriends a former prize fighter who was a childhood idol of his who is on the run from the mob after he refused to throw a fight But a bar-room brawl draws the mobs attention to the man

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Knight 305
programme.desc: Knight 305

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki Ryan and Jack pursue an antique beehive containing vampire bees that suck the life out of their victims

programme.title: Mchale 408
programme.desc: Mchale 408

programme.title: Mchale 302
programme.desc: Mchale 302

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While sitting in a restaurant Gomer witnesses an automobile accident between Sergeant Carter and another driver When in court Gomer takes the oath seriously to tell the truth the whole truth and nothing but the truth

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: When Gomers cousin Goober shows up in the barracks and puts on one of Gomers uniforms and then wanders the base everyone sees the name Pyle on the uniform and thinks Gomer is losing his mind

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The professor makes a dye marker to help get rescued The Skipper plans to join the Navy when they get home but he finds out he must lose weight to meet their requirements--and Gilligan finds out that he must gain weight too

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways discover that a celebrated eccentric artist is on the island and they try to trick him into wanting to return to civilization so that they can use his transmitter

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Theres a new game warden in town and his name is George MacMichael

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa and Luke give Kate a break from her family chores including the cooking

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max gets a hip black partner as he and 99 tour the world as a ping-pong pro in this spoof of I Spy

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: CONTROL tries to get some KAOS files with the help of a non-professional spy

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: It was a dark and stormy night when BJ and the Bear drove two Transylvanian coffins from Frisco to LA meeting up along the way with murder mayhem and maybe even Count Dracula

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Marital strife boils over in both the Post and Addison households and Mister Ed goes to work as an extra in a western movie

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed attempts to torpedo Wilburs plans to have him march in the Pagent Parade

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan concocts a Kommandant of the Year award to distract Klink so a new Nazi rocket being stored protectively at Stalag 13 can be sabotaged

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan must reverse course when efforts to make Klink look competent before the Nazi Inspector General get the Kommandant promoted with a transfer to Berlin

programme.title: KILL ROMMEL
programme.desc: During WWII US Lieutenant Morris and British captain Hull are assigned in a mission to kill Rommel

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: MAD try to stop Gadget from attending the International Congress of Policemen in London

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget must protect the Poot-Ta-Foots treasure

programme.title: A Day in October
programme.desc: This story based on fact is about the movement of Danish Jews out of Denmark to neutral Sweden in the 1940s It focuses on a single family and tells of their involvement with the underground and of their own initially reluctant participation in sabotaging a munitions plant and of the daughters affection for one of the movements leaders

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Irene agrees to meet college classmate Andy after years apart and then panics Dr Todd wrote a book about open marriage but finds his own marriage in jeopardy as he meets admirer Nan Adams ex-wife Betty boards with new fiance Lance

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Boss gets Uncle Jesse to enter a contest for a new type of fossil fuel saying that moonshine is the perfect way to cut down on pollution However Boss has more up his sleeve He plans to tip off the authorities and once Jesse is arrested take credit for the idea himself

programme.title: Hercules 109
programme.desc: Hercules 109

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A joint Doors InternationalTaelon venture creates a machine that allows people to vividly relive a memory but Liam suspects a back alley version of the device is leading to the death of some users

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: War of the Worlds

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: After an eletrical explosion in his lab apparently kills Arcane our arch fiend finds himself on trial in a nightmarish comedy of his crimes against his victims

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: How will Swamp Thing deal with a man who has captured footage of him on film and the deadly creatures released into the swamp

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Koenig is transported to another world and another time Once there he finds that he has to choose between returning to his life and companions on the moon and the love of a beautiful girl

programme.title: BIg Valley
programme.desc: The return of a Spanish nobleman with a claim to land in the Valley which is already occupied becomes further complicated by a romance between Heath and the noblemans daughter

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne rides into Stagge City pop 407 and is promptly arrested on trumped-up vagrant charges After a trial lasting less then a minute hes sentenced to 90 days hard-labor at the nearby silver mine - owned by Stagge

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Cody is asked to join a group of traveling actors unknowingly taking part in a plot to assassinate a US general

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Two very different victims are murdered one a very rich foreign businessman found knifed; the other a poor black police informant found shot in a phone booth Meanwhile a Japanese industrialist is also found dead

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Cinnamon works to stop a munitions magnate who is supplying arms to neo-nazis She reawakens memories of his late wife who was murdered by Hitler

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Erivan Pereira v. Ariom Damkovsky

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Claw causes dairy cows to stop producing milk so people will have to buy products from his store

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget travels to the Greek island of Thermos to stop MAD from stealing a secret formula that will transform lead into gold

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Nick and Scooter are stranded on an alien prehistoric planet

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill has Braxis create a weapon that can induce stars to go nova roasting all their planets and the Guardians must stop him before he can use it on the Sun

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gillian leads the ship and Jayce to where all time meets and one can see into the future After passing several secret tests that show his goodness and courage Jayce is allowed to see his future which shows his father being destroyed

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Audrics image is being projected from a body of water on a planet Jayce goes down to investigate even though Monster Minds are busy draining the water off Jayce meets the fish people the XHal and the Old One and they communicate by telepathy

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: A radioactive meteor crashes on Earth and VENOM steals it by disguising Switchblade as a UFO

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM are on the hunt to find the missing part of the Emerald Arrowhead which will lead to an alien spacecraft the Star Chariot

programme.desc: Warrior With a Closed Heart

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin and Pit are on their way back from Dragons Den when they get ambushed by the Sheriff of Nottinghams soldiers Kevin and Pit join forces with Robin Hood to defeat the Sheriff

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: In Hoopland an inventor is annoyed that he is small so he builds a robot and makes a wish however when the wish goes wrong; Captain N Princess Lana and Larry Bird help him by going into Hoop Mountain and face Clockman

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Their mystic weapons start to fail them Dungeon Master tells his pupils they need to be recharged in the Hall of Bones But first they must find a guide to the Hall

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger
